title: aster ovatus var. ripensis
intro: Aster ovatus var. ripensis, also known as the Ripp's Aster or a variety of the Aster ovatus, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aster ovatus var. ripensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
